quote: Men go to far greater lengths to avoid what they fear than to obtain what they desire. – Dan Brown
fact: “Ithyphallophobia" is a morbid fear of seeing, thinking about or having an erect penis.
joke: I was fired from the keyboard factory yesterday.  I wasn't putting in enough shifts.
